title: Brothy Orzo & Meatballs
summary: A fast way to use up leftovers from our Spicy Lamb Meatball Traybake. This herby, garlicky orzo broth is super comforting, and the meatballs and chickpeas make it packed with protein.

method.description: Make the Spicy Lamb Meatball Traybake.
Pick the herb leaves and discard the stems. Thinly slice the red chilli.

Pour the stock into a large saucepan and bring to the boil. Once boiling, tip in the orzo and cook for 2 mins less than the packet instructions, the orzo will keep cooking in the broth. If you want it looser, just add more stock or a splash of water.
Stir in the lamb meatball traybake mix and half the herbs. Let everything simmer until piping hot and the orzo is tender. Taste and season with salt and black pepper.
Ladle into bowls and finish with the remaining herbs, the sliced chilli and a drizzle of olive oil.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
